name: ad-visibility-verification-saas
description: Cluster-ready commercial beta SaaS platform for ad visibility verification with server-gate, WebCrypto/canvas proof, signed batch events, mandatory Redis runtime in cluster mode, Redis event stream, PostgreSQL durable storage, batch ingestion workers, CDN/reverse-proxy deployment scaffolding and high-load test tooling

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check gate.js && node --check tls-fingerprint-proxy.js && node --check ensure-certs.js && node --check start.js && node --check start-tls-gated.js && node --check scripts/restore-check.js && node --check scripts/restore-drill.js && node --check scripts/load-test.js && node --check scripts/export-events.js && node --check scripts/compact-events.js && node --check scripts/import-events-to-postgres.js && node --check scripts/external-backup.js && node --check scripts/worker-ingestion.js && node --check scripts/analytics-aggregate.js && node --check scripts/db-migrate.js && node --check scripts/setup-postgres-db.js && node --check scripts/start-db-mode.js && node --check scripts/bootstrap-postgres-from-json.js && node --check src/adapters/postgres-adapter.js && node --check src/adapters/redis-queue-adapter.js && node --check src/runtime/scalable-runtime.js && node --check scripts/postgres-maintenance.js && node --check scripts/load-test-cluster-model.js && node --check scripts/seed-postgres-analytics.js && node --check scripts/seed-staging-analytics.js && node --check scripts/mock-postgres-project.js && node --check scripts/print-security-checks.js && node --check tests/security-scenarios-coverage.test.js && node --check tests/ui/test-site-sdk.spec.js && node --check playwright.config.cjs && node --check src/blocks/email-service.js && node --check src/blocks/client-portal-block.js && node --check src/blocks/site-block.js && node --check scripts/ci-local.js && node --check scripts/install-git-hooks.js && node --check scripts/assert-no-secrets.js && node --check tests/ci-cd-contract.test.js && node --check tests/ui/responsive-layout.spec.js && node --check scripts/architecture-audit.js
scripts.start:cluster: CLUSTER_MODE=true ENABLE_REDIS_RUNTIME=true ENABLE_REDIS_EVENT_QUEUE=true ENABLE_POSTGRES_STORAGE=true POSTGRES_AUTO_MIGRATE=true POSTGRES_BOOTSTRAP_FROM_JSON=true PERSIST_EVENT_STATS_IN_JSON=false node server.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run architecture:audit && npm run secrets:scan && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:requested && npm run test:client && npm run test:security && npm run test:ci-contract
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci:local && npm run test:ui

author: Dmytro
